channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Coco Gauff drops a set but reaches the Australian Open quarterfinals. Sabalenka wins, too
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff's consecutive-set streak ended at the Australian Open. Her bid for a second Grand Slam title continued on Sunday with a 5-7, 6-2, 6-1 comeback victory over Belinda Bencic in the fourth round.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz and Novak Djokovic will meet at the Australian Open. This time, it's a quarterfinal
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — It's time for the eighth installment of the riveting, intergenerational rivalry between Novak Djokovic and Carlos Alcaraz.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: McGrath celebrates first-run lead in World Cup slalom with signature Cuche ski flip
item.description: WENGEN, Switzerland (AP) — Atle Lie McGrath raced to the fastest time in the first run of a World Cup slalom on Sunday then paid tribute to a Swiss great with a signature ski flip. The United States-born Norwegian, wearing bib No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Turnovers and depleted defense contribute to top-seeded Lions' quick playoff exit
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions had everything set up the way they wanted this time. After losing last season's NFC championship game at San Francisco, they went 15-2 to earn the NFC's top seed.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lions waste best season in franchise history after falling apart to underdog Commanders in home playoff game
item.description: In a disastrous 45-31 loss to the Washington Commanders on Saturday, the Detroit Lions watched their best regular season in franchise history go to waste.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stephen Curry considered day to day after injuring left ankle in win over Wizards
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry injured his left ankle in the final minutes of the Golden State Warriors victory over Washington on Saturday night and is considered day to day. Curry left the game with just over a minute to play after getting tangled with the Wizards' Jordan Poole.
item.dc:creator: ERIC HE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jayden Daniels, Commanders stun top-seeded Lions 45-31 to reach NFC title game
item.description: Daniels became just the second rookie quarterback to knock off a top-seeded team, joining Joe Flacco, who led Baltimore past Tennessee on Jan. 10, 2009.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Texans' Kris Boyd flings helmet, gets penalized and then shoves his coach on first play vs. Chiefs
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Texans cornerback Kris Boyd nearly shoved Houston special teams coach Frank Ross to the ground after the opening kickoff of their divisional playoff loss to the Kansas City Chiefs on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes and Kelce help Chiefs to a 23-14 win over Texans and another AFC title game trip
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has never lost in the divisional round of the playoffs with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Houston Texans still have never won.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fox exec calls Brady rumors 'a never-ending, merry-go-round' of narratives
item.description: Even as Tom Brady goes through his first postseason and prepares to call his first Super Bowl as a television analyst, rumors about his future continue to be rampant, much to the dismay of Fox Sports.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Return of Sammy Sosa a big draw for fans at Cubs Convention 2025
item.description: The convention promises a weekend of panel discussions, autograph opportunities and the appearance of one of the best all-time hitters, fan favorite Sammy Sosa.
item.dc:creator: Erik Runge, WGN 9

item.title: Utah's struggles at home continue with 5-3 loss to Rangers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club are having a difficult time during its longest homestand of the season. The New York Rangers scored three goals in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-3 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: March Madness will pay women's teams under a new structure approved by the NCAA
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Women's basketball teams finally will be paid for playing games in the NCAA Tournament each March just like the men have for years under a plan approved Wednesday at the NCAA convention.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Big Will's Divisional Round NFL Picks
item.description: In this week's edition of NFL Picks, Big Will gives his picks for all four Divisional Round playoff games this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: SuperMotocross World Championship comes to San Diego: What to know
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will host the Monster Energy AMA Supercross Championship on Saturday, continuing the legacy of off-road motorsports in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: House Republicans pass bill to ban transgender athletes from girls’ sports
item.description: House Republicans passed a bill Tuesday to bar transgender student-athletes from competing in girls’ sports, putting the contentious issue front and center following an election cycle that saw it become a frequent target of Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: Montréal Canadiens hockey player Emil Heineman will be sidelined for several weeks after he was struck by a car in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Former Padres Peavy, Gonzalez headline 77th Salute to the Champions
item.description: The Padres duo, along with WNBA star Charde Houston, now have a permanent place inside the Western Metal Supply Company building at Petco Park as Breitbard Hall of Famers.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Pelletier scores twice as the Flames cruise to 5-2 win over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jakob Pelletier had two goals and an assist, helping the Calgary Flames beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mike McCarthy won't return as the Cowboys' coach. Deion Sanders could be a candidate to replace him
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy will not return as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, owner Jerry Jones said Monday. Jones said the organization and McCarthy mutually agreed to part ways.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: UFC champion booted from Frontier flight after being told he couldn't sit in exit row
item.description: Khabib Nurmagomedov suggested that there may have been “racial” or “national” motivations for booting him from the plane — allegations which Frontier has denied.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: Patrick and Brittany Mahomes welcome third child
item.description: Brittany Mahomes gave birth to the couple’s third child, a girl named Golden Raye Mahomes, on Jan. 12, the couple announced on social media.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Patriots introduce Mike Vrabel as new head coach
item.description: The New England Patriots are set to formally introduce Mike Vrabel as the team's 16th head coach in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Buccaneers lose to Commanders 23-20; Commanders first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days
item.description: Jayden Daniels ran for a critical first down to set up Zane Gonzalez's 37-yard field goal that clanged off the right upright and went through as time expired, and the Commanders beat the Tampa Bay Buccaneers 23-20 in an NFC wild-card game Sunday night for the franchise’s first playoff win in 6,945 d
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI AP Pro Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jayden Daniels leads Commanders to first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days, 23-20 over the Buccaneers
item.description:
New owners. New general manager. New coach. New franchise quarterback.
That’s the formula — with an emphasis on the QB — that Washington rode to playoff success after nearly two decades of futility.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Clippers, Lakers to resume their wildfire-delayed schedules on Monday
item.description: NBA games are scheduled to return to wildfire-ravaged Los Angeles on Monday night, with the Clippers planning to resume their schedule when they host the Miami Heat and the Lakers set to host Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5
